memoryArtifacts.description:
1410s in England

Events from the 1410s in England.

 1410s in England 


Monarch – Henry IV (to 20 March 1413), Henry V

1410 Owain Glyndŵr continues his rebellion against England,[1] although a cost …

Origin Displayed: French - Origins Available: English, French. Spelling variations of this family name include: Bigot, Bigodet, Bigotteau, Bigott, Bigote, Biguot, Biguotte, Bigoteau, Bigotau, Bigottau, Biguotau, Biguotteau, Bigotin, Bigottin, Bigottier, Bigottière, Bigod, Bigos, Bigault, Biggault, Biggot, Biggott, Biggote, Biggotte, Biggotin Biggottin, Biggottière, Biggottier, Biguoteau, Bigaut and many more. First found in Ille de France, where the family has been a prominent family for centuries, and were seated with lands and manor. Some of the first settlers of this family name or some of its variants were: including many of the name who migrated to the New World from the mid 17th century onward. (From www.HouseOfNames.com Archives copyright  2000 - 2009).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Bigod於大約1410年7月7日出生在英國越可爾澤特林頓時，他的父親Sir John Bigod35歲，母親Constance de Mauley39歲。他於1432年2月27日與Anne Greystoke在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁澤特林頓結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1461年3月29日在英國越可爾堂頓享年50歲，埋葬在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Bigod于大约1410年7月7日出生在英国越可爾澤特林頓时，他的父亲Sir John Bigod35岁，母亲Constance de Mauley39岁。他于1432年2月27日与Anne Greystoke在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁澤特林頓结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1461年3月29日在英国越可爾堂頓享年50岁，埋葬在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Bigod was born about 7 July 1410, in Settrington, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John Bigod, was 35 and his mother, Constance de Mauley, was 39. He married Anne Greystoke on 27 February 1432, in Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 29 March 1461, in Towton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.Of, Settrington, Yorkshire, England: Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Bigod est né environ 7 juillet 1410, à Settrington, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Bigod, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Constance de Mauley, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Anne Greystoke le 27 février 1432, à Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 29 mars 1461, à Towton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Of, Settrington, Yorkshire, England: Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Bigod um 7. Juli 1410 in Settrington, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Bigod 35 und seine Mutter Constance de Mauley 39. Er hat am 27. Februar 1432 in Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom Anne Greystoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 29. März 1461 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Towton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Bigod è nato il circa 7 luglio 1410 nel Settrington, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Bigod, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Constance de Mauley, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Anne Greystoke il 27 febbraio 1432, nel Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 29 marzo 1461, nel Towton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Bigodが約1410年7月7日にイギリスヨークシュアイアセットリントンで生まれた時，父Sir John Bigodは35歳，母Constance de Mauleyは39歳であった。1432年2月27日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングセットリントンでAnne Greystokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1461年3月29日にイギリスヨークシュアイアトウトンで50歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Of, Settrington, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 세트링턴
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Bigod(이)가 대략 1410년 7월 7일 영국 요르크실르 세트링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Bigod(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance de Mauley(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1432년 2월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 세트링턴에서 Anne Greystoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1461년 3월 29일 영국 요르크실르 타우턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.about 7 July 1410–29 March 1461: aproximadamente 7 de julho de 1410–29 de março de 1461
pt.Of, Settrington, Yorkshire, England: Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Bigod nasceu aproximadamente 7 de julho de 1410, em Settrington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Bigod, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Constance de Mauley, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Greystoke em 27 de fevereiro de 1432, em Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de março de 1461, em Towton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Of, Settrington, Yorkshire, England: Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Of, Settrington, Yorkshire, England: сеттрингтон, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Bigod родился около 7 июля 1410 г. в местности сеттрингтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Bigod было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance de Mauley, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Greystoke 27 февраля 1432 г. в местности сеттрингтон, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 29 марта 1461 г. в местности тоутон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Bigod nació aproximadamente 7 de julio de 1410, en Settrington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Bigod, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Constance de Mauley, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Anne Greystoke el 27 de febrero de 1432, en Settrington, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1461, en Towton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
